sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2541" key="ai)nogo/nos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰνο-γόνος</orth>, <sense id="n2541.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">child of praise</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ph.Epic.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:9:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
